api_key.description: Beamer API key, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Beamer API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; the nps stream's dateFrom filter uses this on a fresh sync (no persisted cursor yet).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
